name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Blocks 99% of UVA and UVB rays with polarized lenses and a lightweight frame that fits all face shapes.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen lotion that protects your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant, non-greasy formula suitable for all skin types.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Light and breezy floral summer dress made from 100% breathable cotton. Perfect for beach trips, brunches, or casual summer outings. Available in multiple sizes.

name: Inflatable Beach Floatie
description: Giant inflatable pool and beach floatie in fun summer shapes. Made from durable, puncture-resistant PVC. Easy to inflate and deflate for convenient storage.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Spacious waterproof tote bag perfect for the beach or pool. Features a mesh pocket, zipper closure, and comfortable shoulder straps. Holds towels, sunscreen, and more.

name: Men's Jeans
description: Quick-dry men's Jeans with a tropical print. Features an elastic waistband, drawstring, and side pockets. Perfect for swimming, surfing, or beach volleyball.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothing aloe vera gel that instantly cools and hydrates sun-exposed skin. Reduces redness and peeling. Fragrance-free and dermatologist tested for sensitive skin.

name: Wide Brim Sun Hat
description: Stylish wide brim straw hat offering excellent sun protection for your face and neck. Lightweight, breathable weave with an adjustable inner band for a perfect fit.

name: Portable Beach Umbrella
description: UV-blocking portable beach umbrella with a sand anchor base. 6.5 ft canopy provides shade for two people. Lightweight aluminum pole and carrying bag included.

name: Women's Clothes
description: Vibrant two-piece bikini set in a bold tropical print. Adjustable ties for a custom fit. Made from chlorine-resistant fabric that retains shape and color all season.

name: Hydrating Face Mist
description: Refreshing facial mist infused with hyaluronic acid and rose water. Instantly hydrates and cools your skin on hot summer days. Travel-friendly 100ml spray bottle.

name: Waterproof Sport Sandals
description: Durable waterproof sport sandals with adjustable velcro straps and a non-slip rubber sole. Ideal for beach walks, water sports, or casual summer adventures.
